arts.ttl: Real Madrid scoop Laureus World Team of the Year award
arts.sum: Real Madrid scooped the Laureus World Team of the Year award. Real Madrid enjoyed a successful and unforgettable 2024, winning five trophies, something it had only achieved once before in the club's history (in 2017).

arts.ttl: Set for Real Madrid? Xabi Alonso's Leverkusen future to be decided in "next few weeks"
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen Managing Director Fernando Carro has voiced his frustration over the constant speculation surrounding Xabi Alonso and stated that the Spaniard’s future will need to be...

arts.ttl: How VAR has dramatically changed LaLiga standings: Real Madrid vs Barcelona
arts.sum: The Video Assistant Referee, aka VAR, has taken center stage in LaLiga this season, and with six rounds to go, the number of interventions is on pace to break the all-time record . After the most recent round, Real Madrid and Villarreal voiced outrage over controversial decisions.

Getafe are in a comfortable position when it comes to surviving the drop, but if they want to try and reach the European places, their home form must improve. They've won just one of their last seven ...

arts.ttl: Latest transfer news: Man United lead Cunha race as Real Madrid eye Fernandez
arts.sum: The January transfer window is now little more than a distant memory in European football and as such clubs across the continent are already making plans for the summer window. Teams are working...

arts.ttl: Is Trent Alexander-Arnold actually making the right call joining Real Madrid? Liverpool are more primed for success than Los Blancos, and homegrown right-back may regret quitting Arne Slot's project
arts.sum: The emotion of Alexander-Arnold’s clincher at Leicester City to move within one more win of the Premier League title was telling in one word, the image of his shirt hanging off the corner flag in front of the away end worth a thousand more. So much of his last four months has been centred around a prospective move to Real Madrid when his Liverpool contract expires in the summer.

arts.ttl: Cristian Romero breaks silence on Tottenham future amid Real Madrid transfer talk
arts.sum: Romero has now revealed that he wants to play in La Liga during his career. "There are almost two months left of the season, and I want to perform at my best and try to finish it in the best way possible.

arts.ttl: VIDEO: Xabi or Klopp for Real Madrid?
arts.sum: In a recently released exclusive Members-only podcast on Patreon, Managing Madrid’s Kiyan Sobhani and Lucas Navarrete spent nearly an hour answering questions sent in from fans in the weekly mailbag. Listeners and watchers are encouraged to sign up as a Member on Patreon to ensure they don’t miss out on the bonus content that Managing Madrid posts multiple times per week.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid lineup vs. Getafe: Predicted XI for La Liga clash with Carlo Ancelotti set to make rotations
